esp32time_set_time.message0: Set the RTC time to %1 year %2 month %3 day %4 hour %5 minute %6 second
esp32time_set_time.tooltip: Set the year, month, day, hour, minute and second of the RTC time

esp32time_set_time_epoch.message0: Set RTC time to Unix timestamp %1
esp32time_set_time_epoch.tooltip: Set RTC time using Unix timestamp

esp32time_get_time.message0: Get the time string of RTC time (HH:MM:SS)

esp32time_get_date.message0: Get the date string of RTC time %1

esp32time_get_datetime.message0: Get the date and time string of RTC time %1

esp32time_get_formatted_time.message0: Get the custom format time of RTC time %1
esp32time_get_formatted_time.tooltip: Get time string using custom format

esp32time_get_epoch.message0: Get Unix timestamp of RTC time

esp32time_get_second.message0: Get the number of seconds of RTC time (0-59)

esp32time_get_minute.message0: Get the minutes of RTC time (0-59)

esp32time_get_hour.message0: Get the hour of RTC time %1

esp32time_get_wday.message0: Get the day of the week in RTC time (0-6)
esp32time_get_wday.tooltip: Get the day of the week (0-6)

esp32time_get_day.message0: Get the date of RTC time (1-31)

esp32time_get_month.message0: Get the month of RTC time (0-11)

esp32time_get_year.message0: Get the year of RTC time

esp32time_set_offset.message0: Set the time zone offset of the RTC time to %1 seconds

esp32time_get_yday.message0: Get the day of the year in RTC time (0-365)
esp32time_get_yday.tooltip: Get the day of the year (0-365)
